---
title: ""
---

## Studies

```{=html}
<div class="timeline">

  <div class="tl-item" onclick="toggleItem(this)">
    <div class="tl-year">2027</div>
    <div class="tl-dot"></div>
    <div class="tl-card">
      <div class="tl-card-top">
        <div class="tl-summary">
          <p class="tl-name">Postgraduate in Science Communication</p>
          <p class="tl-org">International University of Valencia</p>
          <p class="tl-hint">▼ read more</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-body">
        <p><em>In progress · Part-time online while working full time</em></p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="tl-item" onclick="toggleItem(this)">
    <div class="tl-year">2020</div>
    <div class="tl-dot"></div>
    <div class="tl-card">
      <div class="tl-card-top">
        <div class="tl-summary">
          <p class="tl-name">PhD in Atmospheric Physics</p>
          <p class="tl-org">University of Santiago de Compostela</p>
          <p class="tl-hint">▼ read more</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-body">
        <p><em>Grade: Merit · European Doctorate Mention</em></p>
        <p>Thesis: <em>Precipitation Recycling and the Importance of the Land-Atmosphere Interactions over the European Continent</em></p>
        <p><a href="http://hdl.handle.net/10347/23330" target="_blank" class="link-link">Access full PhD dissertation</a></p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="tl-item" onclick="toggleItem(this)">
    <div class="tl-year">2014</div>
    <div class="tl-dot"></div>
    <div class="tl-card">
      <div class="tl-card-top">
        <div class="tl-summary">
          <p class="tl-name">MSc in Meteorology</p>
          <p class="tl-org">Universitat de Barcelona</p>
          <p class="tl-hint">▼ read more</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-body">
        <p>Relevant subjects: Dynamic Meteorology · Physics of the Atmosphere · Climate and Climate Change · Atmospheric Pollution · Hydrometeorology · Meteorological Modelling · Forecasting</p>
        <p>Master's thesis: <em>Effect of lateral boundary conditions in the WRF limited-area model</em></p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="tl-item" onclick="toggleItem(this)">
    <div class="tl-year">2013</div>
    <div class="tl-dot"></div>
    <div class="tl-card">
      <div class="tl-card-top">
        <div class="tl-summary">
          <p class="tl-name">BSc in Physics</p>
          <p class="tl-org">University of Santiago de Compostela</p>
          <p class="tl-hint">▼ read more</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-body">
        <p>Degree thesis <em>(with honours)</em>: <em>Precipitation recycling in Europe. Moisture tracers method for computation of recycling rate</em></p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

## Positions

```{=html}
<div class="timeline">

  <div class="tl-item" onclick="toggleItem(this)">
    <div class="tl-year">2024</div>
    <div class="tl-dot"></div>
    <div class="tl-card">
      <div class="tl-card-top">
        <div class="tl-summary">
          <p class="tl-name">Climate Scientist</p>
          <p class="tl-org">Tragsatec – AEMET · 2024–Present</p>
          <p class="tl-hint">▼ read more</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-body">
        <p>Working at the interface between climate science and user-oriented services, translating seasonal prediction outputs into accessible information for decision-making contexts such as agriculture and water management.</p>
        <ul>
          <li>Developed interactive web dashboards and graphics to communicate seasonal weather prediction to non-specialist users</li>
          <li>Translated climate data into visual narratives through maps, plots and digital interfaces</li>
          <li>Produced written briefings and communication materials for institutional stakeholders such as AEMET, ECMWF and DWD</li>
        </ul>
        <p style="text-align:center; margin-top: 0.8rem;"><a href="https://dashboard-tragsatec.onrender.com/" target="_blank" class="link-link">View Project Results</a></p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="tl-item" onclick="toggleItem(this)">
    <div class="tl-year">2023</div>
    <div class="tl-dot"></div>
    <div class="tl-card">
      <div class="tl-card-top">
        <div class="tl-summary">
          <p class="tl-name">WRF Specialist</p>
          <p class="tl-org">MeteoGRID S.L. · 2023–2024</p>
          <p class="tl-hint">▼ read more</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-body">
        <p>Designed and executed high-resolution WRF-SFIRE coupled atmosphere–fire simulations for wildfire risk assessment and post-fire analysis across diverse terrain and fuel types in the Iberian Peninsula.</p>
        <p><em>Tools: Python · R · WRF-SFIRE · HPC · Bash · NCO · GrADS</em></p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="tl-item" onclick="toggleItem(this)">
    <div class="tl-year">2018</div>
    <div class="tl-dot"></div>
    <div class="tl-card">
      <div class="tl-card-top">
        <div class="tl-summary">
          <p class="tl-name">Climate Scientist</p>
          <p class="tl-org">Meteogalicia · 2018–2021</p>
          <p class="tl-hint">▼ read more</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-body">
        <ul>
          <li>Participated in a multi-institutional oceanic research project, coordinating data and deliverables exchange among partner institutions</li>
          <li>Processed and quality-controlled large oceanographic datasets (SST, salinity, currents, reanalysis fields) from in-situ buoys and model outputs</li>
          <li>Conducted statistical analyses to characterise interannual variability and trend signals along the Galician coastlines</li>
          <li>Authored technical reports and scientific deliverables for national and EU-funded project milestones</li>
        </ul>
        <p><em>Tools: Python · HPC · Bash · LaTeX · QGIS</em></p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="tl-item" onclick="toggleItem(this)">
    <div class="tl-year">2018</div>
    <div class="tl-dot"></div>
    <div class="tl-card">
      <div class="tl-card-top">
        <div class="tl-summary">
          <p class="tl-name">Paleoclimate Researcher</p>
          <p class="tl-org">University College London · 2018</p>
          <p class="tl-hint">▼ read more</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-body">
        <ul>
          <li>Developed a Python numerical model to simulate speleothem (stalagmite) growth dynamics as a function of drip rate, cave temperature and pCO₂</li>
          <li>Designed and populated a MySQL relational database to store and query multi-proxy palaeoclimate datasets from the North Atlantic region</li>
        </ul>
        <p><em>Tools: Python · MySQL · NumPy · Matplotlib</em></p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="tl-item" onclick="toggleItem(this)">
    <div class="tl-year">2015</div>
    <div class="tl-dot"></div>
    <div class="tl-card">
      <div class="tl-card-top">
        <div class="tl-summary">
          <p class="tl-name">Broadcast Meteorologist</p>
          <p class="tl-org">Santiago TV · 2015–2016</p>
          <p class="tl-hint">▼ read more</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-body">
        <ul>
          <li>Delivered daily on-air weather reports for a general audience, translating complex meteorological data into clear, engaging narratives</li>
          <li>Designed broadcast graphics and visual storytelling materials to support forecast communication in a live news organisation environment</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="tl-item" onclick="toggleItem(this)">
    <div class="tl-year">2014</div>
    <div class="tl-dot"></div>
    <div class="tl-card">
      <div class="tl-card-top">
        <div class="tl-summary">
          <p class="tl-name">PhD Candidate</p>
          <p class="tl-org">University of Santiago de Compostela · 2014–2017</p>
          <p class="tl-hint">▼ read more</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-body">
        <ul>
          <li>Designed and carried out WRF mesoscale simulations to study land-surface–atmosphere feedbacks over the Iberian Peninsula and Europe</li>
          <li>Developed post-processing scripts in Python and GrADS for automated extraction, statistical analysis and publication visualisation of model output fields</li>
          <li>Presented results at international conferences</li>
          <li>Mentored undergraduate students in programming and atmospheric modelling tasks</li>
          <li>Successfully defended the doctoral thesis before an international jury in 2020</li>
        </ul>
        <p><em>Including a six-month research visit to the Instituto Dom Luiz (IDL), University of Lisbon, collaborating on WRF–LEAF-Hydro experiments.</em></p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

## Languages & Skills

```{=html}
<div class="skills-box">

  <h3>Languages</h3>

  <div class="lang-row">
    <span class="lang-name"> Spanish</span>
    <div class="lang-bar-bg"><div class="lang-bar" style="width:100%"></div></div>
    <span class="lang-level">Native</span>
  </div>
  <div class="lang-row">
    <span class="lang-name">󠁥󠁳󠁧Galician</span>
    <div class="lang-bar-bg"><div class="lang-bar" style="width:100%"></div></div>
    <span class="lang-level">Native</span>
  </div>
  <div class="lang-row">
    <span class="lang-name"> English</span>
    <div class="lang-bar-bg"><div class="lang-bar" style="width:82%"></div></div>
    <span class="lang-level">C1 · 2024</span>
  </div>
  <div class="lang-row">
    <span class="lang-name"> Portuguese</span>
    <div class="lang-bar-bg"><div class="lang-bar" style="width:65%"></div></div>
    <span class="lang-level">B2 · 2017</span>
  </div>

  <hr class="skills-divider"/>

  <h3>Skills & Tools</h3>

  <div class="hex-svg-wrap">
    <svg id="hex-tools" viewBox="0 0 820 420" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:100%;height:auto;">

      <!-- === THREADS from hexagons to their circle === -->
      <!-- DataViz → blue circle (cx=370 cy=195) -->
      <line class="thread thread-anim" x1="108" y1="104" x2="336" y2="195" style="animation-delay:0s"/>
      <line class="thread thread-anim" x1="210" y1="80"  x2="340" y2="180" style="animation-delay:0.5s"/>
      <line class="thread thread-anim" x1="108" y1="290" x2="336" y2="210" style="animation-delay:1.0s"/>
      <line class="thread thread-anim" x1="210" y1="314" x2="345" y2="220" style="animation-delay:1.5s"/>

      <!-- Storytelling → purple circle (cx=450 cy=160) -->
      <line class="thread thread-anim" x1="560" y1="80"  x2="478" y2="148" style="animation-delay:0.3s"/>
      <line class="thread thread-anim" x1="470" y1="106" x2="452" y2="175" style="animation-delay:0.8s"/>

      <!-- Design → teal circle (cx=450 cy=250) -->
      <line class="thread thread-anim" x1="620" y1="114" x2="478" y2="242" style="animation-delay:0.6s"/>
      <line class="thread thread-anim" x1="620" y1="254" x2="478" y2="258" style="animation-delay:1.1s"/>

      <!-- === DATA VIZ hexagons (left) === -->
      <!-- Python -->
      <polygon class="hex-poly hex-dv" points="108,52 148,75 148,121 108,144 68,121 68,75" onclick="svgTip('python')"/>
      <text class="hex-txt" x="108" y="98">Python</text>

      <!-- Tableau -->
      <polygon class="hex-poly hex-dv" points="210,38 250,61 250,107 210,130 170,107 170,61" onclick="svgTip('tableau')"/>
      <text class="hex-txt" x="210" y="84">Tableau</text>

      <!-- Datawrapper -->
      <polygon class="hex-poly hex-dv" points="108,248 148,271 148,317 108,340 68,317 68,271" onclick="svgTip('dw')"/>
      <text class="hex-txt" x="108" y="282">Data-</text>
      <text class="hex-txt" x="108" y="296">wrapper</text>

      <!-- D3.js -->
      <polygon class="hex-poly hex-dv" points="210,272 250,295 250,341 210,364 170,341 170,295" onclick="svgTip('d3')"/>
      <text class="hex-txt" x="210" y="318">D3.js</text>

      <!-- === STORYTELLING hexagons (top right) === -->
      <!-- Canva -->
      <polygon class="hex-poly hex-st" points="560,38 600,61 600,107 560,130 520,107 520,61" onclick="svgTip('canva')"/>
      <text class="hex-txt" x="560" y="84">Canva</text>

      <!-- HTML & CSS -->
      <polygon class="hex-poly hex-st" points="470,18 510,41 510,87 470,110 430,87 430,41" onclick="svgTip('html')"/>
      <text class="hex-txt" x="470" y="58">HTML</text>
      <text class="hex-txt" x="470" y="72">&amp; CSS</text>

      <!-- === DESIGN hexagons (right) === -->
      <!-- Illustrator -->
      <polygon class="hex-poly hex-ds" points="660,68 700,91 700,137 660,160 620,137 620,91" onclick="svgTip('ai')"/>
      <text class="hex-txt" x="660" y="114">Illustrator</text>

      <!-- Bazaart -->
      <polygon class="hex-poly hex-ds" points="660,208 700,231 700,277 660,300 620,277 620,231" onclick="svgTip('baz')"/>
      <text class="hex-txt" x="660" y="254">Bazaart</text>

      <!-- === THREE OVERLAPPING CIRCLES (Venn) in center === -->
      <!-- Blue: DataViz -->
      <circle cx="400" cy="195" r="50" fill="#c4d8f2" stroke="#94b8e8" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5"/>

      <!-- Purple: Storytelling -->
      <circle cx="452" cy="195" r="50" fill="#d8c4f0" stroke="#b898d8" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.45"/>

      <!-- Teal: Design -->
      <circle cx="426" cy="235" r="50" fill="#b8e8d4" stroke="#74c8a8" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.45"/>


      <!-- Labels on circles -->
        <text class="hex-txt" x="385" y="178" style="font-size:8.5px;fill:#5577aa">Dataviz</text>
        <text class="hex-txt" x="468" y="178" style="font-size:8.5px;fill:#8855bb">Storytelling</text>
        <text class="hex-txt" x="426" y="272" style="font-size:8.5px;fill:#3a9977">Design</text>

      <!-- === TOOLTIP === -->
      <rect id="stip-bg" x="200" y="372" width="420" height="30" rx="6" fill="white" stroke="#e0e0e0" stroke-width="1" opacity="0"/>
      <text id="stip-txt" x="410" y="392" text-anchor="middle" font-family="system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="#666" font-style="italic" opacity="0"></text>

    </svg>
  </div>

</div>
```

## Selected Training

::: {.women-box}
###### 2025 - Communication Course for Scientific Professionals
[Specialised training in science communication for technical and research profiles. *14 hours*]{.textopeque}

###### 2022 - Introductory Course on GIS and Mapping with R
[Foundations of geospatial analysis and cartographic workflows in R. *20 hours*]{.textopeque}

###### 2021 - Microsoft PowerPoint and Presentation Software – Intermediate Level
[Training in presentation design, multimedia content, animations and effective communication using PowerPoint. *25 hours*]{.textopeque}

###### 2018 - ArcGIS Enterprise Workflows
[Training in enterprise GIS environments and workflow management. *20 hours*]{.textopeque}
:::

## Some Contributions

::: {.women-box}
###### 2025 - Hidden Women in Meteorology: Uncovering the Forgotten Pioneers and Their Legacy
[*Article* · Revista Tiempo y Clima]{.textopeque}
[Science communication article translating the history of women in meteorology for a broad, non-specialist audience.]{.textopeque}
[**Sabela Sanfiz**]{.textopeque}

---

###### 2024 - HiDALGO2 D3.1 Scalability, Optimization and Co-Design Activities
[*Experiment Findings*]{.textopeque}
[K. Nikas · P. Anastasiadis · A. Rivera Campos · M. Lawenda · et al.]{.textopeque}

---

###### 2020 - Precipitation Recycling and the Importance of the Land-Atmosphere Interactions over the European Continent
[*PhD Thesis* · University of Santiago de Compostela]{.textopeque}
[**Sabela Sanfiz** · G. Miguez-Macho]{.textopeque}
[[hdl.handle.net/10347/23330](http://hdl.handle.net/10347/23330){.link-link}]{.textopeque}

---

###### 2020 - The Utility of Land-Surface Model Simulations to Provide Drought Information in a Water Management Context
[*Article* · Water Resources Management]{.textopeque}
[P. Quintana Seguí · A. Barella-Ortiz · **Sabela Sanfiz** · G. Miguez-Macho]{.textopeque}

---

###### 2019 - An Integrated Perspective of the Operational Forecasting System in Rías Baixas (Galicia, Spain)
[*Book Chapter* · Lecture Notes in Computer Science]{.textopeque}
[A. Venâncio · P. Montero · P. Melo Costa · J. J. Taboada · et al.]{.textopeque}
:::

```{=html}
<style>
/* ── Timeline ── */
.timeline {
  position: relative;
  max-width: 780px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0.5rem 1rem 2rem 1rem;
}

.timeline::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  left: 85px;
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  width: 2px;
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, #b2c5fc 6%, #b2c5fc 94%, transparent);
}

.tl-item {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 60px 24px 1fr;
  gap: 0 16px;
  align-items: start;
  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.tl-year {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #92a7f2;
  text-align: right;
  padding-top: 16px;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
}

.tl-dot {
  width: 13px;
  height: 13px;
  background: #fff;
  border: 2.5px solid #92a7f2;
  border-radius: 50%;
  margin-top: 15px;
  justify-self: center;
  transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.tl-item:hover .tl-dot,
.tl-item.open .tl-dot {
  background: #92a7f2;
  transform: scale(1.2);
}

.tl-card {
  background: #fff;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.07);
  border: 1px solid #eeebe4;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: box-shadow 0.2s ease;
}

.tl-item:hover .tl-card {
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.11);
}

.tl-card-top {
  padding: 0.8rem 1.1rem;
}

.tl-name {
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #1a1a1a;
  margin: 0 0 0.15rem 0;
  line-height: 1.3;
}

.tl-org {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: #888;
  margin: 0 0 0.35rem 0;
}

.tl-hint {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  color: #999;
  margin: 0;
}

.tl-body {
  display: none;
  padding: 0 1.1rem 1rem 1.1rem;
  border-top: 1px solid #f0ece4;
  animation: fadeSlide 0.3s ease;
}

.tl-item.open .tl-body {
  display: block;
}

.tl-body p, .tl-body li {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
  color: #444;
  margin: 0.7rem 0 0 0;
  text-align: justify;
}

.tl-body ul {
  margin: 0.7rem 0 0 0;
  padding-left: 1.2rem;
}

.tl-body li {
  margin: 0.3rem 0;
}

/* ── Skills ── */
.skills-box {
  background: #f5f5f5;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 1.5rem 2rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  max-width: 780px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}

.skills-box h3 {
  color: #b2c5fc !important;
  font-size: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  margin-top: 0;
}

.lang-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.7rem;
}

.lang-name {
  width: 110px;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: #333;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.lang-bar-bg {
  flex: 1;
  height: 7px;
  background: #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 99px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.lang-bar {
  height: 100%;
  border-radius: 99px;
  background: #e8a020;
}

.lang-level {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: #999;
  width: 70px;
  text-align: right;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.skills-divider {
  border: none;
  border-top: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
  margin: 1.2rem 0;
}

.skills-cat { margin-bottom: 1.2rem; }

.cat-label {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #94805c;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
}

#toc-title {
  display: none;
}
.logos-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.8rem;
}

.logo-chip {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  width: 56px;
}

.logo-chip .img-wrap {
  width: 32px;
  height: 32px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}

.logo-chip .img-wrap img {
  width: 32px !important;
  height: 32px !important;
  max-width: 32px !important;
  max-height: 32px !important;
  object-fit: contain;
  display: block;
}

.logo-chip span {
  font-size: 0.6rem;
  color: #666;
  text-align: center;
  line-height: 1.2;
}

/* ── Resto ── */
.textopeque {
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  color: #777;
  display: block;
  line-height: 1.4;
  margin-bottom: 0.1rem;
}

.women-box h3 {
  margin-top: 1.8rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
}

.women-box h3:first-child {
  margin-top: 0;
}

.link-link {
  color: inherit !important;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: underline;
  text-decoration-color: #94805c;
  text-underline-offset: 3px;
  transition: text-decoration-color 0.2s;
}

.link-link:hover {
  text-decoration-color: #a3aabf;
}
#toc-title {
  display: none;
}

@keyframes fadeSlide {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-5px); }
  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}

@media (max-width: 500px) {
  .timeline::before { left: 52px; }
  .tl-item { grid-template-columns: 44px 20px 1fr; gap: 0 10px; }
  .tl-year { font-size: 0.65rem; }
}

/* ── Hexagons SVG ────────────────────────────────────── */
.hex-svg-wrap {
  margin-top: 0.5rem;
  width: 100%;
}

.thread {
  stroke: #cacaca;
  stroke-width: 1.2;
  fill: none;
}

.thread-anim {
  stroke-dasharray: 5 9;
  animation: flowThread 2s linear infinite;
}

@keyframes flowThread {
  from { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
  to   { stroke-dashoffset: -28; }
}

.hex-poly {
  stroke-width: 1.5;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: opacity 0.18s;
}

.hex-poly:hover { opacity: 0.78; }

.hex-dv { fill: #dce8fb; stroke: #94b8e8; }
.hex-st { fill: #e8d6f5; stroke: #b898d8; }
.hex-ds { fill: #d4f0e8; stroke: #74c8a8; }

.hex-txt {
  font-family: system-ui, sans-serif;
  font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 600;
  fill: #444;
  text-anchor: middle;
  dominant-baseline: middle;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.svg-group-label {
  font-family: system-ui, sans-serif;
  font-size: 8.5px;
  font-weight: 700;
  fill: #bbb;
  text-anchor: middle;
  letter-spacing: 1.2px;
}

</style>

<script>
function toggleItem(item) {
  item.classList.toggle('open');
  const hint = item.querySelector('.tl-hint');
  hint.textContent = item.classList.contains('open') ? '▲ close' : '▼ read more';
}

const svgTips = {
  python:  "Climate maps, animations and data wrangling — #30DayMapChallenge & research",
  tableau: "Personal data visualisation projects",
  dw:      "Personal data visualisation projects",
  d3:      "Interactive dashboards for seasonal forecast communication — Tragsatec/AEMET",
  canva:   "CV design and presentation materials",
  html:    "This website",
  ai:      "Climate art posters — An Inconvenient Data, film roll series",
  baz:     "Año 2021 en la Tierra — film reel collage"
};
let svgActive = null;
function svgTip(id) {
  const bg  = document.getElementById('stip-bg');
  const txt = document.getElementById('stip-txt');
  if (svgActive === id) {
    bg.setAttribute('opacity','0');
    txt.setAttribute('opacity','0');
    svgActive = null;
    return;
  }
  svgActive = id;
  txt.textContent = svgTips[id];
  bg.setAttribute('opacity','1');
  txt.setAttribute('opacity','1');
}
function toggleHex(el) {}

</script>
```
